677 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),

1156public:
1157 struct Properties {
1158 using is_signedTy = ::mlir::UnitAttr;
1159 is_signedTy is_signed;
1160
1161 auto getIsSigned() {
1162 auto &propStorage = this->is_signed;
1163 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::UnitAttr>(propStorage);
1164 }
1165 void setIsSigned(const ::mlir::UnitAttr &propValue) {
1166 this->is_signed = propValue;
1167 }
1168 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
1169 return
1170 rhs.is_signed == this->is_signed &&
1171 true;
1172 }
1173 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
1174 return !(*this == rhs);
1175 }
1176 };
1177protected:
1178 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
1179 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
1180 Properties properties;
1181 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
1182public:
1183 BV2IntOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), properties(properties), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
1184 odsOpName.emplace("smt.bv2int", odsAttrs.getContext());
1185 }
1186
1187 BV2IntOpGenericAdaptorBase(BV2IntOp op);
1188
1189 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
1190 return {index, 1};
1191 }
1192
1193 const Properties &getProperties() {
1194 return properties;
1195 }
1196
1197 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
1198 return odsAttrs;
1199 }
1200
1201 ::mlir::UnitAttr getIsSignedAttr();
1202 bool getIsSigned();
1203};
1204} // namespace detail
1205template <typename RangeT>
1206class BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::BV2IntOpGenericAdaptorBase {
1207 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
1208 using Base = detail::BV2IntOpGenericAdaptorBase;
1209public:
1210 BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
1211
1212 BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<Properties *>() : Properties{}), regions) {}
1213
1214 BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = nullptr) : BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, Properties{}, {}) {}
1215
1216 BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const BV2IntOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
1217
1218 template <typename LateInst = BV2IntOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, BV2IntOp>>>
1219 BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
1220
1221 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
1222 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
1223 }
1224
1225 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
1226 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
1227 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
1228 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
1229 }
1230
1231 ValueT getInput() {
1232 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
1233 }
1234
1235 RangeT getOperands() {
1236 return odsOperands;
1237 }
1238
1239private:
1240 RangeT odsOperands;
1241};
1242class BV2IntOpAdaptor : public BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor<::mlir::ValueRange> {
1243public:
1244 using BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor::BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor;
1245 BV2IntOpAdaptor(BV2IntOp op);
1246
1247 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);
1248};
1249class BV2IntOp : public ::mlir::Op<BV2IntOp, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroRegions, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneResult, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneTypedResult<::llzk::smt::IntType>::Impl, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroSuccessors, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneOperand, ::mlir::OpTrait::OpInvariants, ::mlir::BytecodeOpInterface::Trait, ::mlir::ConditionallySpeculatable::Trait, ::mlir::OpTrait::AlwaysSpeculatableImplTrait, ::mlir::MemoryEffectOpInterface::Trait, ::mlir::InferTypeOpInterface::Trait> {
1250public:
1251 using Op::Op;
1252 using Op::print;
1253 using Adaptor = BV2IntOpAdaptor;
1254 template <typename RangeT>
1255 using GenericAdaptor = BV2IntOpGenericAdaptor<RangeT>;
1256 using FoldAdaptor = GenericAdaptor<::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::Attribute>>;
1257 using Properties = FoldAdaptor::Properties;
1258 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
1259 static ::llvm::StringRef attrNames[] = {::llvm::StringRef("is_signed")};
1260 return ::llvm::ArrayRef(attrNames);
1261 }
1262
1263 ::mlir::StringAttr getIsSignedAttrName() {
1264 return getAttributeNameForIndex(0);
1265 }
1266
1267 static ::mlir::StringAttr getIsSignedAttrName(::mlir::OperationName name) {
1268 return getAttributeNameForIndex(name, 0);
1269 }
1270
1271 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
1272 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.bv2int");
1273 }
1274
1275 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
1276 return {index, 1};
1277 }
1278
1279 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
1280 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
1281 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
1282 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
1283 }
1284
1285 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType> getInput() {
1286 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>>(*getODSOperands(0).begin());
1287 }
1288
1289 ::mlir::OpOperand &getInputMutable() {
1290 auto range = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(0);
1291 return getOperation()->getOpOperand(range.first);
1292 }
1293
1294 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
1295 return {index, 1};
1296 }
1297
1298 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
1299 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
1300 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
1301 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
1302 }
1303
1304 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::IntType> getResult() {
1305 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::IntType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());
1306 }
1307
1308 static ::llvm::LogicalResult setPropertiesFromAttr(Properties &prop, ::mlir::Attribute attr, ::llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
1309 static ::mlir::Attribute getPropertiesAsAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop);
1310 static llvm::hash_code computePropertiesHash(const Properties &prop);
1311 static std::optional<mlir::Attribute> getInherentAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name);
1312 static void setInherentAttr(Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name, mlir::Attribute value);
1313 static void populateInherentAttrs(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs);
1314 static ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInherentAttrs(::mlir::OperationName opName, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs, llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
1315 static ::llvm::LogicalResult readProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeReader &reader, ::mlir::OperationState &state);
1316 void writeProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeWriter &writer);
1317 ::mlir::UnitAttr getIsSignedAttr() {
1318 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::UnitAttr>(getProperties().is_signed);
1319 }
1320
1321 bool getIsSigned();
1322 void setIsSignedAttr(::mlir::UnitAttr attr) {
1323 getProperties().is_signed = attr;
1324 }
1325
1326 void setIsSigned(bool attrValue);
1327 ::mlir::Attribute removeIsSignedAttr() {
1328 auto &attr = getProperties().is_signed;
1329 attr = {};
1330 return attr;
1331 }
1332
1333 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::mlir::Value input, /*optional*/::mlir::UnitAttr is_signed);
1334 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Value input, /*optional*/::mlir::UnitAttr is_signed);
1335 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::Value input, /*optional*/::mlir::UnitAttr is_signed);
1336 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::mlir::Value input, /*optional*/bool is_signed = false);
1337 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Value input, /*optional*/bool is_signed = false);
1338 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::Value input, /*optional*/bool is_signed = false);
1339 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
1340 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
1341 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
1342 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
1343 static ::llvm::LogicalResult inferReturnTypes(::mlir::MLIRContext *context, ::std::optional<::mlir::Location> location, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attributes, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions, ::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::Type>&inferredReturnTypes);
1344 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
1345 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
1346 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
1347private:
1348 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
1349 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
1350 }
1351
1352 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
1353 assert(index < 1 && "invalid attribute index");
1354 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
1355 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
1356 "dependent dialect loading?");
1357 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
1358 }
1359
1360public:
1361};
1362} // namespace smt
1363} // namespace llzk
1364MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::BV2IntOp)

1418 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};

1427 }
1428

1430 return odsOperands;
1431 }

1613 }

1616 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);

1628
1629 ::mlir::OpOperand &getLhsMutable() {
1630 auto range = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(0);
1631 return getOperation()->getOpOperand(range.first);
1632 }
1633
1634 ::mlir::OpOperand &getRhsMutable() {
1635 auto range = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(1);
1636 return getOperation()->getOpOperand(range.first);
1637 }
1638
1639 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
1640 return {index, 1};
1641 }
1642
1643 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
1644 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
1645 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
1646 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
1647 }
1648
1649 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType> getResult() {
1650 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());
1651 }
1652
1653 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
1654 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
1655 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
1656 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
1657 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
1658 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
1659 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
1660 static ::llvm::LogicalResult inferReturnTypes(::mlir::MLIRContext *context, ::std::optional<::mlir::Location> location, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attributes, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions, ::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::Type>&inferredReturnTypes);
1661 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
1662 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
1663 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
1664public:
1665};
1666} // namespace smt
1667} // namespace llzk

1678class BVAndOpGenericAdaptorBase {

1686 odsOpName.emplace("smt.bv.and", odsAttrs.getContext());
1687 }
1688
1689 BVAndOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::Operation *op) : odsAttrs(op->getRawDictionaryAttrs()), odsOpName(op->getName()), odsRegions(op->getRegions()) {}

1691 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {

1701template <typename RangeT>
1702class BVAndOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::BVAndOpGenericAdaptorBase {
1703 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
1704 using Base = detail::BVAndOpGenericAdaptorBase;
1705public:
1706 BVAndOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = {}, const ::mlir::EmptyProperties &properties = {}, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
1707
1708 BVAndOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : BVAndOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<::mlir::EmptyProperties *>() : ::mlir::EmptyProperties{}), regions) {}
1709
1710 BVAndOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const BVAndOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
1711
1712 template <typename LateInst = BVAndOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, BVAndOp>>>
1713 BVAndOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
1714
1715 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
1716 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
1717 }
1718
1719 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
1720 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
1721 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
1722 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
1723 }
1724
1725 ValueT getLhs() {
1726 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
1727 }
1728
1729 ValueT getRhs() {
1730 return (*getODSOperands(1).begin());
1731 }
1732
1733 RangeT getOperands() {
1734 return odsOperands;
1735 }
1736
1737private:
1738 RangeT odsOperands;
1739};

1745 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);
1746};

1829namespace detail {
1830class BVCmpOpGenericAdaptorBase {
1831public:
1832 struct Properties {
1833 using predTy = ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicateAttr;
1834 predTy pred;
1835
1836 auto getPred() {
1837 auto &propStorage = this->pred;
1838 return ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicateAttr>(propStorage);
1839 }
1840 void setPred(const ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicateAttr &propValue) {
1841 this->pred = propValue;
1842 }
1843 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
1844 return
1845 rhs.pred == this->pred &&
1846 true;
1847 }
1848 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
1849 return !(*this == rhs);
1850 }
1851 };
1852protected:
1853 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
1854 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
1855 Properties properties;
1856 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
1857public:
1858 BVCmpOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), properties(properties), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
1859 odsOpName.emplace("smt.bv.cmp", odsAttrs.getContext());
1860 }
1861
1862 BVCmpOpGenericAdaptorBase(BVCmpOp op);
1863
1864 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
1865 return {index, 1};
1866 }
1867
1868 const Properties &getProperties() {
1869 return properties;
1870 }
1871
1872 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
1873 return odsAttrs;
1874 }
1875
1876 ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicateAttr getPredAttr() {
1877 auto attr = ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicateAttr>(getProperties().pred);
1878 return attr;
1879 }
1880
1881 ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicate getPred();
1882};
1883} // namespace detail

1892
1893 BVCmpOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = nullptr) : BVCmpOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, Properties{}, {}) {}

1901 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
1902 }
1903
1904 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
1905 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
1906 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
1907 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
1908 }
1909
1910 ValueT getLhs() {
1911 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
1912 }
1913
1914 ValueT getRhs() {
1915 return (*getODSOperands(1).begin());
1916 }
1917
1918 RangeT getOperands() {
1919 return odsOperands;
1920 }
1921
1922private:

1992 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
1993 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};

1995

1998 }
1999
2000 static ::llvm::LogicalResult setPropertiesFromAttr(Properties &prop, ::mlir::Attribute attr, ::llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
2001 static ::mlir::Attribute getPropertiesAsAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop);
2002 static llvm::hash_code computePropertiesHash(const Properties &prop);
2003 static std::optional<mlir::Attribute> getInherentAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name);
2004 static void setInherentAttr(Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name, mlir::Attribute value);
2005 static void populateInherentAttrs(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs);
2006 static ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInherentAttrs(::mlir::OperationName opName, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs, llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
2007 static ::llvm::LogicalResult readProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeReader &reader, ::mlir::OperationState &state);
2008 void writeProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeWriter &writer);
2009 ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicateAttr getPredAttr() {
2010 return ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicateAttr>(getProperties().pred);
2011 }
2012
2013 ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicate getPred();
2014 void setPredAttr(::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicateAttr attr) {
2015 getProperties().pred = attr;
2016 }
2017
2018 void setPred(::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicate attrValue);
2019 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicateAttr pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
2020 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicateAttr pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
2021 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicateAttr pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
2022 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicate pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
2023 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicate pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
2024 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::llzk::smt::BVCmpPredicate pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
2025 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
2026 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
2027 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
2028 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
2029 static ::llvm::LogicalResult inferReturnTypes(::mlir::MLIRContext *context, ::std::optional<::mlir::Location> location, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attributes, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions, ::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::Type>&inferredReturnTypes);
2030 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
2031 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
2032 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
2033private:
2034 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
2035 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
2036 }
2037
2038 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
2039 assert(index < 1 && "invalid attribute index");
2040 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
2041 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
2042 "dependent dialect loading?");
2043 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
2044 }
2045
2046public:
2047};

2049} // namespace llzk
2050MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::BVCmpOp)

2060class BVConstantOpGenericAdaptorBase {
2061public:

2064 valueTy value;
2065

2067 auto &propStorage = this->value;
2068 return ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::BitVectorAttr>(propStorage);
2069 }
2070 void setValue(const ::llzk::smt::BitVectorAttr &propValue) {
2071 this->value = propValue;
2072 }
2073 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
2074 return
2075 rhs.value == this->value &&
2076 true;
2077 }
2078 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
2079 return !(*this == rhs);
2080 }
2081 };
2082protected:
2083 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;

2085 Properties properties;
2086 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
2087public:

2104 }

2107 auto attr = ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::BitVectorAttr>(getProperties().value);
2108 return attr;
2109 }
2110
2111 ::llzk::smt::BitVectorAttr getValue();
2112};

2114template <typename RangeT>

2137 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
2138 }

2140 RangeT getOperands() {

2142 }
2143

2163 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
2164 static ::llvm::StringRef attrNames[] = {::llvm::StringRef("value")};

2166 }
2167
2168 ::mlir::StringAttr getValueAttrName() {
2169 return getAttributeNameForIndex(0);
2170 }
2171

2173 return getAttributeNameForIndex(name, 0);
2174 }
2175
2176 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
2177 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.bv.constant");
2178 }
2179
2180 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
2181 return {index, 1};
2182 }
2183
2184 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
2185 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
2186 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
2187 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
2188 }
2189
2190 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
2191 return {index, 1};
2192 }
2193
2194 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
2195 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
2196 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
2197 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
2198 }
2199
2200 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType> getResult() {
2201 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());
2202 }
2203
2204 static ::llvm::LogicalResult setPropertiesFromAttr(Properties &prop, ::mlir::Attribute attr, ::llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
2205 static ::mlir::Attribute getPropertiesAsAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop);
2206 static llvm::hash_code computePropertiesHash(const Properties &prop);
2207 static std::optional<mlir::Attribute> getInherentAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name);
2208 static void setInherentAttr(Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name, mlir::Attribute value);
2209 static void populateInherentAttrs(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs);
2210 static ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInherentAttrs(::mlir::OperationName opName, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs, llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
2211 static ::llvm::LogicalResult readProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeReader &reader, ::mlir::OperationState &state);
2212 void writeProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeWriter &writer);
2213 ::llzk::smt::BitVectorAttr getValueAttr() {
2214 return ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::BitVectorAttr>(getProperties().value);
2215 }
2216
2217 ::llzk::smt::BitVectorAttr getValue();
2218 void setValueAttr(::llzk::smt::BitVectorAttr attr) {
2219 getProperties().value = attr;
2220 }
2221
2222 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, const llvm::APInt &value);
2223 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, uint64_t value, unsigned width);
2224 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::llzk::smt::BitVectorAttr value);
2225 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::llzk::smt::BitVectorAttr value);
2226 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::llzk::smt::BitVectorAttr value);
2227 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
2228 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
2229 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
2230 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
2231 ::mlir::OpFoldResult fold(FoldAdaptor adaptor);
2232 static ::llvm::LogicalResult inferReturnTypes(::mlir::MLIRContext *context, ::std::optional<::mlir::Location> location, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attributes, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions, ::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::Type>&inferredReturnTypes);
2233 void getAsmResultNames(::mlir::OpAsmSetValueNameFn setNameFn);
2234 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
2235 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
2236 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
2237private:
2238 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
2239 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
2240 }
2241
2242 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
2243 assert(index < 1 && "invalid attribute index");
2244 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
2245 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
2246 "dependent dialect loading?");
2247 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
2248 }
2249
2250public:
2251};
2252} // namespace smt
2253} // namespace llzk
2254MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::BVConstantOp)

3023 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
3024 using Base = detail::BVSDivOpGenericAdaptorBase;
3025public:
3026 BVSDivOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = {}, const ::mlir::EmptyProperties &properties = {}, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
3027
3028 BVSDivOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : BVSDivOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<::mlir::EmptyProperties *>() : ::mlir::EmptyProperties{}), regions) {}
3029
3030 BVSDivOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const BVSDivOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
3031
3032 template <typename LateInst = BVSDivOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, BVSDivOp>>>
3033 BVSDivOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
3034
3035 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
3036 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
3037 }
3038
3039 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
3040 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
3041 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
3042 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
3043 }
3044
3045 ValueT getLhs() {
3046 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
3047 }
3048
3049 ValueT getRhs() {
3050 return (*getODSOperands(1).begin());
3051 }
3052
3053 RangeT getOperands() {
3054 return odsOperands;
3055 }
3056
3057private:
3058 RangeT odsOperands;
3059};

3064
3065 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);
3066};

3492 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
3493 }
3494
3495 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
3496 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
3497 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
3498 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
3499 }
3500
3501 ValueT getLhs() {
3502 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
3503 }
3504
3505 ValueT getRhs() {
3506 return (*getODSOperands(1).begin());
3507 }
3508
3509 RangeT getOperands() {
3510 return odsOperands;
3511 }
3512
3513private:
3514 RangeT odsOperands;
3515};

3939
3940 BVXOrOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : BVXOrOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<::mlir::EmptyProperties *>() : ::mlir::EmptyProperties{}), regions) {}
3941
3942 BVXOrOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const BVXOrOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
3943
3944 template <typename LateInst = BVXOrOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, BVXOrOp>>>
3945 BVXOrOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
3946
3947 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
3948 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
3949 }
3950
3951 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
3952 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
3953 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
3954 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
3955 }
3956
3957 ValueT getLhs() {
3958 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
3959 }
3960
3961 ValueT getRhs() {
3962 return (*getODSOperands(1).begin());
3963 }
3964
3965 RangeT getOperands() {
3966 return odsOperands;
3967 }
3968
3969private:
3970 RangeT odsOperands;
3971};

3975 BVXOrOpAdaptor(BVXOrOp op);

3977 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);
3978};

4057//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
4058// ::llzk::smt::BoolConstantOp declarations
4059//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
4060
4061namespace detail {
4062class BoolConstantOpGenericAdaptorBase {
4063public:
4064 struct Properties {
4065 using valueTy = ::mlir::BoolAttr;
4066 valueTy value;
4067
4068 auto getValue() {
4069 auto &propStorage = this->value;
4070 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::BoolAttr>(propStorage);
4071 }
4072 void setValue(const ::mlir::BoolAttr &propValue) {
4073 this->value = propValue;
4074 }
4075 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
4076 return
4077 rhs.value == this->value &&
4078 true;
4079 }
4080 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
4081 return !(*this == rhs);
4082 }
4083 };
4084protected:
4085 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
4086 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
4087 Properties properties;
4088 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
4089public:
4090 BoolConstantOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), properties(properties), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
4091 odsOpName.emplace("smt.constant", odsAttrs.getContext());
4092 }
4093
4094 BoolConstantOpGenericAdaptorBase(BoolConstantOp op);
4095
4096 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
4097 return {index, 1};
4098 }
4099
4100 const Properties &getProperties() {
4101 return properties;
4102 }
4103
4104 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
4105 return odsAttrs;
4106 }
4107
4108 ::mlir::BoolAttr getValueAttr() {
4109 auto attr = ::llvm::cast<::mlir::BoolAttr>(getProperties().value);
4110 return attr;
4111 }
4112
4113 bool getValue();
4114};
4115} // namespace detail

4124

4126
4127 BoolConstantOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const BoolConstantOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}

4130 BoolConstantOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
4131
4132 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
4133 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
4134 }
4135
4136 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
4137 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
4138 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
4139 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
4140 }
4141
4142 RangeT getOperands() {
4143 return odsOperands;
4144 }
4145
4146private:

4148};

4182 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {

4188 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),

4205
4206 static ::llvm::LogicalResult setPropertiesFromAttr(Properties &prop, ::mlir::Attribute attr, ::llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
4207 static ::mlir::Attribute getPropertiesAsAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop);
4208 static llvm::hash_code computePropertiesHash(const Properties &prop);
4209 static std::optional<mlir::Attribute> getInherentAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name);
4210 static void setInherentAttr(Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name, mlir::Attribute value);
4211 static void populateInherentAttrs(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs);
4212 static ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInherentAttrs(::mlir::OperationName opName, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs, llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
4213 static ::llvm::LogicalResult readProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeReader &reader, ::mlir::OperationState &state);
4214 void writeProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeWriter &writer);
4215 ::mlir::BoolAttr getValueAttr() {
4216 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::BoolAttr>(getProperties().value);
4217 }
4218
4219 bool getValue();
4220 void setValueAttr(::mlir::BoolAttr attr) {
4221 getProperties().value = attr;
4222 }
4223
4224 void setValue(bool attrValue);
4225 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::mlir::BoolAttr value);
4226 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::BoolAttr value);
4227 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::BoolAttr value);
4228 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, bool value);

4230 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, bool value);

4232 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
4233 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
4234 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
4235 ::mlir::OpFoldResult fold(FoldAdaptor adaptor);
4236 static ::llvm::LogicalResult inferReturnTypes(::mlir::MLIRContext *context, ::std::optional<::mlir::Location> location, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attributes, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions, ::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::Type>&inferredReturnTypes);
4237 void getAsmResultNames(::mlir::OpAsmSetValueNameFn setNameFn);
4238 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
4239 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
4240 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
4241private:
4242 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
4243 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
4244 }
4245
4246 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
4247 assert(index < 1 && "invalid attribute index");
4248 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
4249 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
4250 "dependent dialect loading?");
4251 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
4252 }
4253
4254public:
4255};

4428 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
4429 return {index, 1};
4430 }
4431
4432 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
4433 return odsAttrs;
4434 }
4435
4436};
4437} // namespace detail
4438template <typename RangeT>
4439class ConcatOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::ConcatOpGenericAdaptorBase {
4440 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
4441 using Base = detail::ConcatOpGenericAdaptorBase;
4442public:
4443 ConcatOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = {}, const ::mlir::EmptyProperties &properties = {}, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
4444
4445 ConcatOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : ConcatOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<::mlir::EmptyProperties *>() : ::mlir::EmptyProperties{}), regions) {}
4446
4447 ConcatOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const ConcatOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
4448
4449 template <typename LateInst = ConcatOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, ConcatOp>>>
4450 ConcatOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
4451
4452 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
4453 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
4454 }
4455
4456 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
4457 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
4458 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
4459 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
4460 }
4461
4462 ValueT getLhs() {
4463 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
4464 }
4465
4466 ValueT getRhs() {
4467 return (*getODSOperands(1).begin());
4468 }
4469
4470 RangeT getOperands() {
4471 return odsOperands;
4472 }
4473
4474private:
4475 RangeT odsOperands;
4476};
4477class ConcatOpAdaptor : public ConcatOpGenericAdaptor<::mlir::ValueRange> {
4478public:
4479 using ConcatOpGenericAdaptor::ConcatOpGenericAdaptor;
4480 ConcatOpAdaptor(ConcatOp op);
4481
4482 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);
4483};
4484class ConcatOp : public ::mlir::Op<ConcatOp, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroRegions, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneResult, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneTypedResult<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>::Impl, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroSuccessors, ::mlir::OpTrait::NOperands<2>::Impl, ::mlir::OpTrait::OpInvariants, ::mlir::ConditionallySpeculatable::Trait, ::mlir::OpTrait::AlwaysSpeculatableImplTrait, ::mlir::MemoryEffectOpInterface::Trait, ::mlir::InferTypeOpInterface::Trait> {

4492 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
4493 return {};
4494 }
4495
4496 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
4497 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.bv.concat");
4498 }
4499
4500 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
4501 return {index, 1};
4502 }
4503
4504 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
4505 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
4506 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
4507 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
4508 }

4510 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType> getLhs() {
4511 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>>(*getODSOperands(0).begin());
4512 }
4513
4514 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType> getRhs() {
4515 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>>(*getODSOperands(1).begin());
4516 }
4517
4518 ::mlir::OpOperand &getLhsMutable() {
4519 auto range = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(0);
4520 return getOperation()->getOpOperand(range.first);
4521 }
4522
4523 ::mlir::OpOperand &getRhsMutable() {
4524 auto range = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(1);
4525 return getOperation()->getOpOperand(range.first);
4526 }
4527
4528 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
4529 return {index, 1};
4530 }
4531
4532 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
4533 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
4534 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
4535 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
4536 }
4537
4538 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType> getResult() {
4539 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());
4540 }
4541
4542 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
4543 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
4544 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
4545 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
4546 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
4547 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
4548 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
4549 static ::llvm::LogicalResult inferReturnTypes(::mlir::MLIRContext *context, ::std::optional<::mlir::Location> location, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attributes, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions, ::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::Type>&inferredReturnTypes);
4550 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
4551 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);

4566namespace detail {
4567class DeclareFunOpGenericAdaptorBase {
4568public:
4569 struct Properties {
4570 using namePrefixTy = ::mlir::StringAttr;
4571 namePrefixTy namePrefix;
4572
4573 auto getNamePrefix() {
4574 auto &propStorage = this->namePrefix;
4575 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::StringAttr>(propStorage);
4576 }
4577 void setNamePrefix(const ::mlir::StringAttr &propValue) {
4578 this->namePrefix = propValue;
4579 }
4580 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
4581 return
4582 rhs.namePrefix == this->namePrefix &&
4583 true;
4584 }
4585 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
4586 return !(*this == rhs);
4587 }
4588 };
4589protected:
4590 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
4591 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
4592 Properties properties;
4593 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
4594public:
4595 DeclareFunOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), properties(properties), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
4596 odsOpName.emplace("smt.declare_fun", odsAttrs.getContext());
4597 }
4598
4599 DeclareFunOpGenericAdaptorBase(DeclareFunOp op);
4600
4601 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
4602 return {index, 1};
4603 }
4604
4605 const Properties &getProperties() {
4606 return properties;
4607 }
4608
4609 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
4610 return odsAttrs;
4611 }
4612
4613 ::mlir::StringAttr getNamePrefixAttr() {
4614 auto attr = ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::StringAttr>(getProperties().namePrefix);
4615 return attr;
4616 }
4617
4618 ::std::optional< ::llvm::StringRef > getNamePrefix();
4619};
4620} // namespace detail

4710
4711 static ::llvm::LogicalResult setPropertiesFromAttr(Properties &prop, ::mlir::Attribute attr, ::llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
4712 static ::mlir::Attribute getPropertiesAsAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop);
4713 static llvm::hash_code computePropertiesHash(const Properties &prop);
4714 static std::optional<mlir::Attribute> getInherentAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name);
4715 static void setInherentAttr(Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name, mlir::Attribute value);

4717 static ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInherentAttrs(::mlir::OperationName opName, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs, llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
4718 static ::llvm::LogicalResult readProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeReader &reader, ::mlir::OperationState &state);
4719 void writeProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeWriter &writer);
4720 ::mlir::StringAttr getNamePrefixAttr() {
4721 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::StringAttr>(getProperties().namePrefix);
4722 }
4723
4724 ::std::optional< ::llvm::StringRef > getNamePrefix();
4725 void setNamePrefixAttr(::mlir::StringAttr attr) {
4726 getProperties().namePrefix = attr;
4727 }
4728
4729 void setNamePrefix(::std::optional<::llvm::StringRef> attrValue);
4730 ::mlir::Attribute removeNamePrefixAttr() {
4731 auto &attr = getProperties().namePrefix;
4732 attr = {};
4733 return attr;
4734 }
4735
4736 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, mlir::Type type);
4737 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, /*optional*/::mlir::StringAttr namePrefix);
4738 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, /*optional*/::mlir::StringAttr namePrefix);
4739 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
4740 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
4741 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
4742 void getAsmResultNames(::mlir::OpAsmSetValueNameFn setNameFn);
4743 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
4744 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
4745 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
4746private:
4747 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
4748 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
4749 }
4750
4751 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
4752 assert(index < 1 && "invalid attribute index");
4753 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
4754 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
4755 "dependent dialect loading?");
4756 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
4757 }
4758
4759public:
4760};

4763MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::DeclareFunOp)

4902class EqOpGenericAdaptorBase {

4906 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
4907 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
4908public:
4909 EqOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = {}, const ::mlir::EmptyProperties &properties = {}, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
4910 odsOpName.emplace("smt.eq", odsAttrs.getContext());
4911 }
4912
4913 EqOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::Operation *op) : odsAttrs(op->getRawDictionaryAttrs()), odsOpName(op->getName()), odsRegions(op->getRegions()) {}
4914
4915 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize);
4916 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
4917 return odsAttrs;
4918 }
4919
4920};
4921} // namespace detail
4922template <typename RangeT>
4923class EqOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::EqOpGenericAdaptorBase {
4924 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
4925 using Base = detail::EqOpGenericAdaptorBase;
4926public:
4927 EqOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = {}, const ::mlir::EmptyProperties &properties = {}, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
4928
4929 EqOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : EqOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<::mlir::EmptyProperties *>() : ::mlir::EmptyProperties{}), regions) {}
4930
4931 EqOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const EqOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
4932
4933 template <typename LateInst = EqOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, EqOp>>>
4934 EqOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
4935
4936 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
4937 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
4938 }
4939
4940 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
4941 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
4942 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
4943 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
4944 }
4945
4946 RangeT getInputs() {
4947 return getODSOperands(0);
4948 }
4949
4950 RangeT getOperands() {
4951 return odsOperands;
4952 }
4953
4954private:
4955 RangeT odsOperands;
4956};

4964class EqOp : public ::mlir::Op<EqOp, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroRegions, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneResult, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneTypedResult<::llzk::smt::BoolType>::Impl, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroSuccessors, ::mlir::OpTrait::VariadicOperands, ::mlir::OpTrait::OpInvariants, ::mlir::ConditionallySpeculatable::Trait, ::mlir::OpTrait::AlwaysSpeculatableImplTrait, ::mlir::MemoryEffectOpInterface::Trait, ::mlir::OpTrait::SameTypeOperands, ::mlir::InferTypeOpInterface::Trait> {

4966 using Op::Op;
4967 using Op::print;

4971 using FoldAdaptor = GenericAdaptor<::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::Attribute>>;
4972 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
4973 return {};
4974 }
4975
4976 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
4977 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.eq");
4978 }
4979
4980 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index);
4981 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
4982 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
4983 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
4984 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
4985 }
4986
4987 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getInputs() {
4988 return getODSOperands(0);
4989 }
4990
4991 ::mlir::MutableOperandRange getInputsMutable();
4992 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
4993 return {index, 1};
4994 }
4995
4996 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
4997 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
4998 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
4999 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
5000 }
5001
5002 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType> getResult() {
5003 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());
5004 }
5005
5006 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, mlir::Value lhs, mlir::Value rhs);
5007 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::mlir::ValueRange inputs);
5008 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
5009 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
5010 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
5011 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &p);
5012 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
5013 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
5014 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify();
5015 static ::llvm::LogicalResult inferReturnTypes(::mlir::MLIRContext *context, ::std::optional<::mlir::Location> location, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attributes, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions, ::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::Type>&inferredReturnTypes);
5016 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
5017public:
5018};
5019} // namespace smt
5020} // namespace llzk

5026//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
5027// ::llzk::smt::ExistsOp declarations
5028//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
5029
5030namespace detail {
5031class ExistsOpGenericAdaptorBase {
5032public:
5033 struct Properties {
5034 using boundVarNamesTy = ::mlir::ArrayAttr;
5035 boundVarNamesTy boundVarNames;
5036
5037 auto getBoundVarNames() {
5038 auto &propStorage = this->boundVarNames;
5039 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::ArrayAttr>(propStorage);
5040 }
5041 void setBoundVarNames(const ::mlir::ArrayAttr &propValue) {
5042 this->boundVarNames = propValue;
5043 }
5044 using noPatternTy = ::mlir::UnitAttr;
5045 noPatternTy noPattern;
5046
5047 auto getNoPattern() {
5048 auto &propStorage = this->noPattern;
5049 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::UnitAttr>(propStorage);
5050 }
5051 void setNoPattern(const ::mlir::UnitAttr &propValue) {
5052 this->noPattern = propValue;
5053 }
5054 using weightTy = ::mlir::IntegerAttr;
5055 weightTy weight;
5056
5057 auto getWeight() {
5058 auto &propStorage = this->weight;
5059 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::IntegerAttr>(propStorage);
5060 }
5061 void setWeight(const ::mlir::IntegerAttr &propValue) {
5062 this->weight = propValue;
5063 }
5064 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
5065 return
5066 rhs.boundVarNames == this->boundVarNames &&
5067 rhs.noPattern == this->noPattern &&
5068 rhs.weight == this->weight &&
5069 true;
5070 }
5071 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
5072 return !(*this == rhs);
5073 }
5074 };
5075protected:
5076 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
5077 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
5078 Properties properties;
5079 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
5080public:
5081 ExistsOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), properties(properties), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
5082 odsOpName.emplace("smt.exists", odsAttrs.getContext());
5083 }
5084
5085 ExistsOpGenericAdaptorBase(ExistsOp op);
5086
5087 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
5088 return {index, 1};
5089 }
5090
5091 const Properties &getProperties() {
5092 return properties;
5093 }
5094
5095 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
5096 return odsAttrs;
5097 }
5098
5099 ::mlir::IntegerAttr getWeightAttr();
5100 uint32_t getWeight();
5101 ::mlir::UnitAttr getNoPatternAttr();
5102 bool getNoPattern();
5103 ::mlir::ArrayAttr getBoundVarNamesAttr() {
5104 auto attr = ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::ArrayAttr>(getProperties().boundVarNames);
5105 return attr;
5106 }
5107
5108 ::std::optional< ::mlir::ArrayAttr > getBoundVarNames();
5109 ::mlir::Region &getBody() {
5110 return *odsRegions[0];
5111 }
5112
5113 ::mlir::RegionRange getPatterns() {
5114 return odsRegions.drop_front(1);
5115 }
5116
5117 ::mlir::RegionRange getRegions() {
5118 return odsRegions;
5119 }
5120
5121};
5122} // namespace detail

5131

5133
5134 ExistsOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const ExistsOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
5135
5136 template <typename LateInst = ExistsOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, ExistsOp>>>

5138

5141 }
5142
5143 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
5144 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
5145 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),

5174 return ::llvm::ArrayRef(attrNames);

5183 }
5184

5186 return getAttributeNameForIndex(1);
5187 }
5188

5190 return getAttributeNameForIndex(name, 1);
5191 }
5192

5194 return getAttributeNameForIndex(2);
5195 }
5196

5198 return getAttributeNameForIndex(name, 2);
5199 }
5200
5201 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
5202 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.exists");
5203 }

5205 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
5206 return {index, 1};
5207 }
5208
5209 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
5210 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);

5217 }
5218

5221 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
5222 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};

5224
5225 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType> getResult() {
5226 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());
5227 }
5228
5229 ::mlir::Region &getBody() {
5230 return (*this)->getRegion(0);
5231 }
5232
5233 ::mlir::MutableArrayRef<::mlir::Region> getPatterns() {
5234 return (*this)->getRegions().drop_front(1);
5235 }
5236
5237 static ::llvm::LogicalResult setPropertiesFromAttr(Properties &prop, ::mlir::Attribute attr, ::llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
5238 static ::mlir::Attribute getPropertiesAsAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop);
5239 static llvm::hash_code computePropertiesHash(const Properties &prop);
5240 static std::optional<mlir::Attribute> getInherentAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name);
5241 static void setInherentAttr(Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name, mlir::Attribute value);
5242 static void populateInherentAttrs(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs);
5243 static ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInherentAttrs(::mlir::OperationName opName, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs, llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
5244 static ::llvm::LogicalResult readProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeReader &reader, ::mlir::OperationState &state);
5245 void writeProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeWriter &writer);
5246 ::mlir::IntegerAttr getWeightAttr() {
5247 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::IntegerAttr>(getProperties().weight);
5248 }
5249
5250 uint32_t getWeight();
5251 ::mlir::UnitAttr getNoPatternAttr() {
5252 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::UnitAttr>(getProperties().noPattern);
5253 }
5254
5255 bool getNoPattern();
5256 ::mlir::ArrayAttr getBoundVarNamesAttr() {
5257 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::ArrayAttr>(getProperties().boundVarNames);
5258 }
5259
5260 ::std::optional< ::mlir::ArrayAttr > getBoundVarNames();
5261 void setWeightAttr(::mlir::IntegerAttr attr) {
5262 getProperties().weight = attr;
5263 }
5264
5265 void setWeight(uint32_t attrValue);
5266 void setNoPatternAttr(::mlir::UnitAttr attr) {
5267 getProperties().noPattern = attr;
5268 }
5269
5270 void setNoPattern(bool attrValue);
5271 void setBoundVarNamesAttr(::mlir::ArrayAttr attr) {
5272 getProperties().boundVarNames = attr;
5273 }
5274
5275 ::mlir::Attribute removeNoPatternAttr() {
5276 auto &attr = getProperties().noPattern;
5277 attr = {};
5278 return attr;
5279 }
5280
5281 ::mlir::Attribute removeBoundVarNamesAttr() {
5282 auto &attr = getProperties().boundVarNames;
5283 attr = {};
5284 return attr;
5285 }
5286
5287 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, mlir::TypeRange boundVarTypes, llvm::function_ref<mlir::Value(mlir::OpBuilder &, mlir::Location, mlir::ValueRange)> bodyBuilder, std::optional<llvm::ArrayRef<mlir::StringRef>> boundVarNames = std::nullopt, llvm::function_ref<mlir::ValueRange(mlir::OpBuilder &, mlir::Location, mlir::ValueRange)> patternBuilder = {}, uint32_t weight = 0, bool noPattern = false);
5288 static void populateDefaultProperties(::mlir::OperationName opName, Properties &properties);
5289 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
5290 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
5291 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify();
5292 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyRegions();
5293 static ::llvm::LogicalResult inferReturnTypes(::mlir::MLIRContext *context, ::std::optional<::mlir::Location> location, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attributes, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions, ::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::Type>&inferredReturnTypes);
5294 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
5295 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
5296private:
5297 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
5298 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
5299 }
5300
5301 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
5302 assert(index < 3 && "invalid attribute index");
5303 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
5304 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
5305 "dependent dialect loading?");
5306 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
5307 }
5308
5309public:
5310};

5334 this->lowBit = propValue;
5335 }

5337 return
5338 rhs.lowBit == this->lowBit &&
5339 true;
5340 }
5341 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
5342 return !(*this == rhs);
5343 }
5344 };
5345protected:
5346 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;

5358 return {index, 1};

5360
5361 const Properties &getProperties() {

5363 }

5366 return odsAttrs;
5367 }

5377template <typename RangeT>

5391 ExtractOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}

5395 }

5401 }

5404 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
5405 }

5407 RangeT getOperands() {
5408 return odsOperands;
5409 }
5410

5412 RangeT odsOperands;
5413};

5421class ExtractOp : public ::mlir::Op<ExtractOp, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroRegions, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneResult, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneTypedResult<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>::Impl, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroSuccessors, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneOperand, ::mlir::OpTrait::OpInvariants, ::mlir::BytecodeOpInterface::Trait, ::mlir::ConditionallySpeculatable::Trait, ::mlir::OpTrait::AlwaysSpeculatableImplTrait, ::mlir::MemoryEffectOpInterface::Trait> {
5422public:
5423 using Op::Op;
5424 using Op::print;
5425 using Adaptor = ExtractOpAdaptor;
5426 template <typename RangeT>
5427 using GenericAdaptor = ExtractOpGenericAdaptor<RangeT>;
5428 using FoldAdaptor = GenericAdaptor<::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::Attribute>>;
5429 using Properties = FoldAdaptor::Properties;
5430 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
5431 static ::llvm::StringRef attrNames[] = {::llvm::StringRef("lowBit")};
5432 return ::llvm::ArrayRef(attrNames);
5433 }

5435 ::mlir::StringAttr getLowBitAttrName() {
5436 return getAttributeNameForIndex(0);
5437 }
5438
5439 static ::mlir::StringAttr getLowBitAttrName(::mlir::OperationName name) {
5440 return getAttributeNameForIndex(name, 0);
5441 }

5443 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
5444 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.bv.extract");
5445 }

5447 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
5448 return {index, 1};
5449 }
5450
5451 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
5452 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
5453 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
5454 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
5455 }
5456
5457 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType> getInput() {
5458 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>>(*getODSOperands(0).begin());
5459 }
5460
5461 ::mlir::OpOperand &getInputMutable() {
5462 auto range = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(0);
5463 return getOperation()->getOpOperand(range.first);
5464 }
5465

5467 return {index, 1};
5468 }
5469
5470 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
5471 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
5472 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
5473 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
5474 }
5475

5477 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());
5478 }
5479
5480 static ::llvm::LogicalResult setPropertiesFromAttr(Properties &prop, ::mlir::Attribute attr, ::llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
5481 static ::mlir::Attribute getPropertiesAsAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop);
5482 static llvm::hash_code computePropertiesHash(const Properties &prop);
5483 static std::optional<mlir::Attribute> getInherentAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name);
5484 static void setInherentAttr(Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name, mlir::Attribute value);
5485 static void populateInherentAttrs(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs);
5486 static ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInherentAttrs(::mlir::OperationName opName, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs, llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
5487 static ::llvm::LogicalResult readProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeReader &reader, ::mlir::OperationState &state);
5488 void writeProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeWriter &writer);
5489 ::mlir::IntegerAttr getLowBitAttr() {
5490 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::IntegerAttr>(getProperties().lowBit);
5491 }
5492
5493 uint32_t getLowBit();
5494 void setLowBitAttr(::mlir::IntegerAttr attr) {
5495 getProperties().lowBit = attr;
5496 }
5497
5498 void setLowBit(uint32_t attrValue);
5499 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::mlir::IntegerAttr lowBit, ::mlir::Value input);
5500 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::IntegerAttr lowBit, ::mlir::Value input);
5501 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, uint32_t lowBit, ::mlir::Value input);
5502 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, uint32_t lowBit, ::mlir::Value input);
5503 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
5504 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
5505 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
5506 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify();
5507 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
5508 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
5509 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
5510private:
5511 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
5512 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
5513 }
5514
5515 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
5516 assert(index < 1 && "invalid attribute index");
5517 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
5518 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
5519 "dependent dialect loading?");
5520 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
5521 }
5522
5523public:
5524};
5525} // namespace smt
5526} // namespace llzk

5532//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
5533// ::llzk::smt::ForallOp declarations
5534//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
5535
5536namespace detail {
5537class ForallOpGenericAdaptorBase {
5538public:
5539 struct Properties {
5540 using boundVarNamesTy = ::mlir::ArrayAttr;
5541 boundVarNamesTy boundVarNames;
5542
5543 auto getBoundVarNames() {
5544 auto &propStorage = this->boundVarNames;
5545 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::ArrayAttr>(propStorage);
5546 }
5547 void setBoundVarNames(const ::mlir::ArrayAttr &propValue) {
5548 this->boundVarNames = propValue;
5549 }
5550 using noPatternTy = ::mlir::UnitAttr;
5551 noPatternTy noPattern;
5552
5553 auto getNoPattern() {
5554 auto &propStorage = this->noPattern;
5555 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::UnitAttr>(propStorage);
5556 }
5557 void setNoPattern(const ::mlir::UnitAttr &propValue) {
5558 this->noPattern = propValue;
5559 }
5560 using weightTy = ::mlir::IntegerAttr;
5561 weightTy weight;
5562
5563 auto getWeight() {
5564 auto &propStorage = this->weight;
5565 return ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::IntegerAttr>(propStorage);
5566 }
5567 void setWeight(const ::mlir::IntegerAttr &propValue) {
5568 this->weight = propValue;
5569 }
5570 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
5571 return
5572 rhs.boundVarNames == this->boundVarNames &&
5573 rhs.noPattern == this->noPattern &&
5574 rhs.weight == this->weight &&
5575 true;
5576 }
5577 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
5578 return !(*this == rhs);
5579 }
5580 };
5581protected:
5582 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
5583 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
5584 Properties properties;
5585 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
5586public:
5587 ForallOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), properties(properties), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
5588 odsOpName.emplace("smt.forall", odsAttrs.getContext());
5589 }
5590
5591 ForallOpGenericAdaptorBase(ForallOp op);
5592
5593 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
5594 return {index, 1};
5595 }
5596
5597 const Properties &getProperties() {
5598 return properties;
5599 }
5600
5601 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
5602 return odsAttrs;
5603 }
5604
5605 ::mlir::IntegerAttr getWeightAttr();
5606 uint32_t getWeight();
5607 ::mlir::UnitAttr getNoPatternAttr();
5608 bool getNoPattern();
5609 ::mlir::ArrayAttr getBoundVarNamesAttr() {
5610 auto attr = ::llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<::mlir::ArrayAttr>(getProperties().boundVarNames);
5611 return attr;
5612 }
5613
5614 ::std::optional< ::mlir::ArrayAttr > getBoundVarNames();
5615 ::mlir::Region &getBody() {
5616 return *odsRegions[0];
5617 }
5618
5619 ::mlir::RegionRange getPatterns() {
5620 return odsRegions.drop_front(1);
5621 }
5622
5623 ::mlir::RegionRange getRegions() {
5624 return odsRegions;
5625 }
5626
5627};
5628} // namespace detail
5629template <typename RangeT>
5630class ForallOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::ForallOpGenericAdaptorBase {
5631 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
5632 using Base = detail::ForallOpGenericAdaptorBase;
5633public:
5634 ForallOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
5635
5636 ForallOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : ForallOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<Properties *>() : Properties{}), regions) {}
5637
5638 ForallOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = nullptr) : ForallOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, Properties{}, {}) {}
5639
5640 ForallOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const ForallOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
5641
5642 template <typename LateInst = ForallOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, ForallOp>>>
5643 ForallOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
5644
5645 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
5646 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
5647 }
5648
5649 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
5650 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
5651 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
5652 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
5653 }
5654
5655 RangeT getOperands() {
5656 return odsOperands;
5657 }
5658
5659private:
5660 RangeT odsOperands;
5661};
5662class ForallOpAdaptor : public ForallOpGenericAdaptor<::mlir::ValueRange> {
5663public:
5664 using ForallOpGenericAdaptor::ForallOpGenericAdaptor;
5665 ForallOpAdaptor(ForallOp op);
5666
5667 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);
5668};

5803 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
5804 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
5805 }

5807 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
5808 assert(index < 3 && "invalid attribute index");
5809 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
5810 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
5811 "dependent dialect loading?");
5812 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
5813 }

5837 odsOpName.emplace("smt.implies", odsAttrs.getContext());
5838 }

5840 ImpliesOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::Operation *op) : odsAttrs(op->getRawDictionaryAttrs()), odsOpName(op->getName()), odsRegions(op->getRegions()) {}

5843 return {index, 1};

5852template <typename RangeT>
5853class ImpliesOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::ImpliesOpGenericAdaptorBase {
5854 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
5855 using Base = detail::ImpliesOpGenericAdaptorBase;
5856public:
5857 ImpliesOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = {}, const ::mlir::EmptyProperties &properties = {}, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
5858
5859 ImpliesOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : ImpliesOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<::mlir::EmptyProperties *>() : ::mlir::EmptyProperties{}), regions) {}
5860
5861 ImpliesOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const ImpliesOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
5862
5863 template <typename LateInst = ImpliesOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, ImpliesOp>>>
5864 ImpliesOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
5865
5866 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
5867 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
5868 }
5869
5870 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
5871 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
5872 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
5873 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
5874 }
5875
5876 ValueT getLhs() {
5877 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
5878 }
5879
5880 ValueT getRhs() {
5881 return (*getODSOperands(1).begin());
5882 }
5883
5884 RangeT getOperands() {
5885 return odsOperands;
5886 }
5887
5888private:
5889 RangeT odsOperands;
5890};

5895
5896 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);

5899public:

5901 using Op::print;

5906 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
5907 return {};
5908 }
5909
5910 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
5911 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.implies");
5912 }
5913
5914 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
5915 return {index, 1};
5916 }
5917
5918 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
5919 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
5920 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
5921 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
5922 }
5923
5924 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType> getLhs() {
5925 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType>>(*getODSOperands(0).begin());
5926 }
5927
5928 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType> getRhs() {
5929 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType>>(*getODSOperands(1).begin());
5930 }
5931
5932 ::mlir::OpOperand &getLhsMutable() {
5933 auto range = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(0);
5934 return getOperation()->getOpOperand(range.first);
5935 }
5936
5937 ::mlir::OpOperand &getRhsMutable() {
5938 auto range = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(1);
5939 return getOperation()->getOpOperand(range.first);
5940 }
5941
5942 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
5943 return {index, 1};
5944 }
5945
5946 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
5947 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
5948 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
5949 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
5950 }
5951
5952 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType> getResult() {
5953 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());
5954 }
5955

5967public:
