6381
6382namespace detail {
6383class IntCmpOpGenericAdaptorBase {
6384public:
6385 struct Properties {
6386 using predTy = ::llzk::smt::IntPredicateAttr;
6387 predTy pred;
6388
6389 auto getPred() {
6390 auto &propStorage = this->pred;
6391 return ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::IntPredicateAttr>(propStorage);
6392 }
6393 void setPred(const ::llzk::smt::IntPredicateAttr &propValue) {
6394 this->pred = propValue;
6395 }
6396 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
6397 return
6398 rhs.pred == this->pred &&
6399 true;
6400 }
6401 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
6402 return !(*this == rhs);
6403 }
6404 };
6405protected:
6406 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
6407 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
6408 Properties properties;
6409 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
6410public:
6411 IntCmpOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), properties(properties), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
6412 odsOpName.emplace("smt.int.cmp", odsAttrs.getContext());
6413 }

6415 IntCmpOpGenericAdaptorBase(IntCmpOp op);
6416
6417 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
6418 return {index, 1};
6419 }
6420
6421 const Properties &getProperties() {
6422 return properties;
6423 }
6424
6425 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
6426 return odsAttrs;
6427 }
6428
6429 ::llzk::smt::IntPredicateAttr getPredAttr() {
6430 auto attr = ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::IntPredicateAttr>(getProperties().pred);
6431 return attr;
6432 }
6433
6434 ::llzk::smt::IntPredicate getPred();
6435};
6436} // namespace detail
6437template <typename RangeT>
6438class IntCmpOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::IntCmpOpGenericAdaptorBase {
6439 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
6440 using Base = detail::IntCmpOpGenericAdaptorBase;
6441public:
6442 IntCmpOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
6443
6444 IntCmpOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : IntCmpOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<Properties *>() : Properties{}), regions) {}
6445
6446 IntCmpOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = nullptr) : IntCmpOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, Properties{}, {}) {}
6447
6448 IntCmpOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const IntCmpOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
6449
6450 template <typename LateInst = IntCmpOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, IntCmpOp>>>
6451 IntCmpOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
6452
6453 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
6454 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
6455 }
6456
6457 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
6458 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
6459 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
6460 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
6461 }
6462
6463 ValueT getLhs() {
6464 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
6465 }
6466
6467 ValueT getRhs() {
6468 return (*getODSOperands(1).begin());
6469 }
6470
6471 RangeT getOperands() {
6472 return odsOperands;
6473 }
6474
6475private:
6476 RangeT odsOperands;
6477};
6478class IntCmpOpAdaptor : public IntCmpOpGenericAdaptor<::mlir::ValueRange> {
6479public:
6480 using IntCmpOpGenericAdaptor::IntCmpOpGenericAdaptor;
6481 IntCmpOpAdaptor(IntCmpOp op);
6482
6483 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);
6484};

6501 }

6505 }

6511 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
6512 return {index, 1};
6513 }
6514
6515 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
6516 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
6517 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
6518 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
6519 }

6522 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::IntType>>(*getODSOperands(0).begin());
6523 }
6524
6525 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::IntType> getRhs() {
6526 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::IntType>>(*getODSOperands(1).begin());
6527 }
6528
6529 ::mlir::OpOperand &getLhsMutable() {
6530 auto range = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(0);
6531 return getOperation()->getOpOperand(range.first);
6532 }
6533
6534 ::mlir::OpOperand &getRhsMutable() {
6535 auto range = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(1);
6536 return getOperation()->getOpOperand(range.first);
6537 }
6538
6539 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
6540 return {index, 1};
6541 }
6542
6543 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
6544 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
6545 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
6546 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
6547 }
6548
6549 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType> getResult() {
6550 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());
6551 }
6552
6553 static ::llvm::LogicalResult setPropertiesFromAttr(Properties &prop, ::mlir::Attribute attr, ::llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
6554 static ::mlir::Attribute getPropertiesAsAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop);
6555 static llvm::hash_code computePropertiesHash(const Properties &prop);
6556 static std::optional<mlir::Attribute> getInherentAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name);
6557 static void setInherentAttr(Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name, mlir::Attribute value);
6558 static void populateInherentAttrs(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs);

6560 static ::llvm::LogicalResult readProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeReader &reader, ::mlir::OperationState &state);
6561 void writeProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeWriter &writer);
6562 ::llzk::smt::IntPredicateAttr getPredAttr() {
6563 return ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::IntPredicateAttr>(getProperties().pred);
6564 }
6565
6566 ::llzk::smt::IntPredicate getPred();
6567 void setPredAttr(::llzk::smt::IntPredicateAttr attr) {
6568 getProperties().pred = attr;
6569 }
6570
6571 void setPred(::llzk::smt::IntPredicate attrValue);
6572 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::llzk::smt::IntPredicateAttr pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
6573 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::llzk::smt::IntPredicateAttr pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
6574 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::llzk::smt::IntPredicateAttr pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
6575 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::llzk::smt::IntPredicate pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
6576 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::llzk::smt::IntPredicate pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
6577 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::llzk::smt::IntPredicate pred, ::mlir::Value lhs, ::mlir::Value rhs);
6578 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
6579 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
6580 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
6581 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
6582 static ::llvm::LogicalResult inferReturnTypes(::mlir::MLIRContext *context, ::std::optional<::mlir::Location> location, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attributes, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions, ::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::Type>&inferredReturnTypes);
6583 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
6584 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
6585 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
6586private:
6587 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
6588 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
6589 }
6590
6591 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
6592 assert(index < 1 && "invalid attribute index");
6593 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
6594 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
6595 "dependent dialect loading?");
6596 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
6597 }
6598
6599public:
6600};

6612namespace detail {
6613class IntConstantOpGenericAdaptorBase {
6614public:
6615 struct Properties {
6616 using valueTy = ::mlir::IntegerAttr;
6617 valueTy value;
6618
6619 auto getValue() {
6620 auto &propStorage = this->value;
6621 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::IntegerAttr>(propStorage);
6622 }
6623 void setValue(const ::mlir::IntegerAttr &propValue) {
6624 this->value = propValue;
6625 }
6626 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
6627 return
6628 rhs.value == this->value &&
6629 true;
6630 }
6631 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
6632 return !(*this == rhs);
6633 }
6634 };
6635protected:
6636 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
6637 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
6638 Properties properties;
6639 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
6640public:
6641 IntConstantOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), properties(properties), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
6642 odsOpName.emplace("smt.int.constant", odsAttrs.getContext());
6643 }
6644
6645 IntConstantOpGenericAdaptorBase(IntConstantOp op);
6646
6647 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
6648 return {index, 1};
6649 }
6650
6651 const Properties &getProperties() {
6652 return properties;
6653 }
6654
6655 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
6656 return odsAttrs;
6657 }
6658
6659 ::mlir::IntegerAttr getValueAttr() {
6660 auto attr = ::llvm::cast<::mlir::IntegerAttr>(getProperties().value);
6661 return attr;
6662 }
6663
6664 ::mlir::APInt getValue();
6665};

7347 return {index, 1};

7349
7350 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
7351 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
7352 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
7353 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};

7356 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::IntType> getResult() {
7357 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::IntType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());

7360 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::mlir::Value input);

7408template <typename RangeT>
7409class IntSubOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::IntSubOpGenericAdaptorBase {
7410 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;

7412public:
7413 IntSubOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = {}, const ::mlir::EmptyProperties &properties = {}, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}

7415 IntSubOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : IntSubOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<::mlir::EmptyProperties *>() : ::mlir::EmptyProperties{}), regions) {}

7423 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
7424 }
7425
7426 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
7427 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
7428 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
7429 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
7430 }
7431
7432 ValueT getLhs() {
7433 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
7434 }
7435
7436 ValueT getRhs() {
7437 return (*getODSOperands(1).begin());
7438 }
7439
7440 RangeT getOperands() {
7441 return odsOperands;
7442 }
7443
7444private:
7445 RangeT odsOperands;
7446};

7817 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Value input);
7818 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::Value input);
7819 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
7820 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
7821 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
7822 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
7823 static ::llvm::LogicalResult inferReturnTypes(::mlir::MLIRContext *context, ::std::optional<::mlir::Location> location, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attributes, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions, ::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::Type>&inferredReturnTypes);
7824 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
7825 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
7826 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
7827public:
7828};
7829} // namespace smt
7830} // namespace llzk
7831MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::NotOp)

7833namespace llzk {

7835
7836//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
7837// ::llzk::smt::OrOp declarations
7838//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
7839
7840namespace detail {
7841class OrOpGenericAdaptorBase {
7842public:
7843protected:
7844 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
7845 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
7846 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
7847public:
7848 OrOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = {}, const ::mlir::EmptyProperties &properties = {}, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
7849 odsOpName.emplace("smt.or", odsAttrs.getContext());
7850 }
7851
7852 OrOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::Operation *op) : odsAttrs(op->getRawDictionaryAttrs()), odsOpName(op->getName()), odsRegions(op->getRegions()) {}
7853
7854 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize);
7855 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
7856 return odsAttrs;
7857 }
7858
7859};
7860} // namespace detail
7861template <typename RangeT>
7862class OrOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::OrOpGenericAdaptorBase {
7863 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
7864 using Base = detail::OrOpGenericAdaptorBase;
7865public:
7866 OrOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = {}, const ::mlir::EmptyProperties &properties = {}, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
7867
7868 OrOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : OrOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<::mlir::EmptyProperties *>() : ::mlir::EmptyProperties{}), regions) {}
7869
7870 OrOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const OrOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
7871
7872 template <typename LateInst = OrOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, OrOp>>>
7873 OrOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
7874
7875 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
7876 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
7877 }
7878
7879 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
7880 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
7881 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
7882 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
7883 }
7884
7885 RangeT getInputs() {
7886 return getODSOperands(0);
7887 }
7888
7889 RangeT getOperands() {
7890 return odsOperands;
7891 }
7892
7893private:
7894 RangeT odsOperands;
7895};
7896class OrOpAdaptor : public OrOpGenericAdaptor<::mlir::ValueRange> {
7897public:
7898 using OrOpGenericAdaptor::OrOpGenericAdaptor;
7899 OrOpAdaptor(OrOp op);
7900
7901 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);
7902};
7903class OrOp : public ::mlir::Op<OrOp, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroRegions, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneResult, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneTypedResult<::llzk::smt::BoolType>::Impl, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroSuccessors, ::mlir::OpTrait::VariadicOperands, ::mlir::OpTrait::OpInvariants, ::mlir::ConditionallySpeculatable::Trait, ::mlir::OpTrait::AlwaysSpeculatableImplTrait, ::mlir::MemoryEffectOpInterface::Trait, ::mlir::InferTypeOpInterface::Trait> {
7904public:
7905 using Op::Op;
7906 using Op::print;
7907 using Adaptor = OrOpAdaptor;
7908 template <typename RangeT>
7909 using GenericAdaptor = OrOpGenericAdaptor<RangeT>;
7910 using FoldAdaptor = GenericAdaptor<::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::Attribute>>;
7911 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
7912 return {};
7913 }
7914
7915 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
7916 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.or");
7917 }
7918
7919 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index);
7920 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
7921 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
7922 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
7923 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
7924 }
7925
7926 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getInputs() {
7927 return getODSOperands(0);
7928 }
7929
7930 ::mlir::MutableOperandRange getInputsMutable();
7931 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
7932 return {index, 1};
7933 }
7934
7935 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
7936 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
7937 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
7938 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
7939 }
7940
7941 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType> getResult() {
7942 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BoolType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());
7943 }
7944
7945 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, mlir::Value lhs, mlir::Value rhs);
7946 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::mlir::ValueRange inputs);
7947 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
7948 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
7949 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
7950 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
7951 static ::llvm::LogicalResult inferReturnTypes(::mlir::MLIRContext *context, ::std::optional<::mlir::Location> location, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attributes, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions, ::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::Type>&inferredReturnTypes);
7952 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
7953 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
7954 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
7955public:
7956};
7957} // namespace smt
7958} // namespace llzk
7959MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::OrOp)

7961namespace llzk {

7964//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
7965// ::llzk::smt::PopOp declarations
7966//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
7967
7968namespace detail {
7969class PopOpGenericAdaptorBase {
7970public:
7971 struct Properties {
7972 using countTy = ::mlir::IntegerAttr;
7973 countTy count;
7974
7975 auto getCount() {
7976 auto &propStorage = this->count;
7977 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::IntegerAttr>(propStorage);
7978 }
7979 void setCount(const ::mlir::IntegerAttr &propValue) {
7980 this->count = propValue;
7981 }
7982 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
7983 return
7984 rhs.count == this->count &&
7985 true;
7986 }
7987 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
7988 return !(*this == rhs);
7989 }
7990 };
7991protected:
7992 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
7993 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
7994 Properties properties;
7995 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
7996public:
7997 PopOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), properties(properties), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
7998 odsOpName.emplace("smt.pop", odsAttrs.getContext());
7999 }
8000
8001 PopOpGenericAdaptorBase(PopOp op);
8002
8003 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
8004 return {index, 1};
8005 }
8006
8007 const Properties &getProperties() {
8008 return properties;
8009 }
8010
8011 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
8012 return odsAttrs;
8013 }
8014
8015 ::mlir::IntegerAttr getCountAttr() {
8016 auto attr = ::llvm::cast<::mlir::IntegerAttr>(getProperties().count);
8017 return attr;
8018 }
8019
8020 uint32_t getCount();
8021};
8022} // namespace detail
8023template <typename RangeT>
8024class PopOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::PopOpGenericAdaptorBase {
8025 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
8026 using Base = detail::PopOpGenericAdaptorBase;
8027public:
8028 PopOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
8029
8030 PopOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : PopOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<Properties *>() : Properties{}), regions) {}
8031
8032 PopOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = nullptr) : PopOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, Properties{}, {}) {}
8033
8034 PopOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const PopOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
8035
8036 template <typename LateInst = PopOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, PopOp>>>
8037 PopOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
8038
8039 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
8040 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
8041 }
8042
8043 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
8044 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
8045 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
8046 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
8047 }
8048
8049 RangeT getOperands() {
8050 return odsOperands;
8051 }
8052
8053private:
8054 RangeT odsOperands;
8055};
8056class PopOpAdaptor : public PopOpGenericAdaptor<::mlir::ValueRange> {
8057public:

8063class PopOp : public ::mlir::Op<PopOp, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroRegions, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroResults, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroSuccessors, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroOperands, ::mlir::OpTrait::OpInvariants, ::mlir::BytecodeOpInterface::Trait> {
8064public:
8065 using Op::Op;
8066 using Op::print;
8067 using Adaptor = PopOpAdaptor;
8068 template <typename RangeT>
8069 using GenericAdaptor = PopOpGenericAdaptor<RangeT>;
8070 using FoldAdaptor = GenericAdaptor<::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::Attribute>>;
8071 using Properties = FoldAdaptor::Properties;
8072 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
8073 static ::llvm::StringRef attrNames[] = {::llvm::StringRef("count")};
8074 return ::llvm::ArrayRef(attrNames);
8075 }
8076
8077 ::mlir::StringAttr getCountAttrName() {
8078 return getAttributeNameForIndex(0);
8079 }
8080
8081 static ::mlir::StringAttr getCountAttrName(::mlir::OperationName name) {
8082 return getAttributeNameForIndex(name, 0);
8083 }
8084
8085 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
8086 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.pop");
8087 }
8088
8089 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
8090 return {index, 1};
8091 }
8092
8093 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
8094 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
8095 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
8096 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
8097 }
8098
8099 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
8100 return {index, 1};
8101 }
8102
8103 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
8104 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
8105 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
8106 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
8107 }
8108
8109 static ::llvm::LogicalResult setPropertiesFromAttr(Properties &prop, ::mlir::Attribute attr, ::llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
8110 static ::mlir::Attribute getPropertiesAsAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop);
8111 static llvm::hash_code computePropertiesHash(const Properties &prop);
8112 static std::optional<mlir::Attribute> getInherentAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name);
8113 static void setInherentAttr(Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name, mlir::Attribute value);
8114 static void populateInherentAttrs(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs);
8115 static ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInherentAttrs(::mlir::OperationName opName, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs, llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
8116 static ::llvm::LogicalResult readProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeReader &reader, ::mlir::OperationState &state);
8117 void writeProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeWriter &writer);
8118 ::mlir::IntegerAttr getCountAttr() {
8119 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::IntegerAttr>(getProperties().count);
8120 }
8121
8122 uint32_t getCount();
8123 void setCountAttr(::mlir::IntegerAttr attr) {
8124 getProperties().count = attr;
8125 }
8126
8127 void setCount(uint32_t attrValue);
8128 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::IntegerAttr count);
8129 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::IntegerAttr count);
8130 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, uint32_t count);
8131 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, uint32_t count);
8132 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
8133 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
8134 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
8135 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
8136 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
8137private:
8138 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
8139 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
8140 }
8141
8142 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
8143 assert(index < 1 && "invalid attribute index");
8144 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
8145 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
8146 "dependent dialect loading?");
8147 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
8148 }
8149
8150public:
8151};
8152} // namespace smt
8153} // namespace llzk
8154MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::PopOp)

8320 }
8321
8322 void setCount(uint32_t attrValue);
8323 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::IntegerAttr count);
8324 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::IntegerAttr count);
8325 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, uint32_t count);
8326 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, uint32_t count);
8327 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
8328 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
8329 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
8330 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
8331 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
8332private:
8333 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
8334 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
8335 }
8336
8337 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
8338 assert(index < 1 && "invalid attribute index");
8339 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
8340 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
8341 "dependent dialect loading?");
8342 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
8343 }
8344
8345public:
8346};
8347} // namespace smt
8348} // namespace llzk
8349MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::PushOp)

8352namespace smt {
8353
8354//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
8355// ::llzk::smt::RepeatOp declarations
8356//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
8357
8358namespace detail {
8359class RepeatOpGenericAdaptorBase {
8360public:
8361protected:
8362 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
8363 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
8364 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
8365public:
8366 RepeatOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = {}, const ::mlir::EmptyProperties &properties = {}, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
8367 odsOpName.emplace("smt.bv.repeat", odsAttrs.getContext());
8368 }
8369
8370 RepeatOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::Operation *op) : odsAttrs(op->getRawDictionaryAttrs()), odsOpName(op->getName()), odsRegions(op->getRegions()) {}
8371
8372 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
8373 return {index, 1};
8374 }
8375
8376 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
8377 return odsAttrs;
8378 }
8379
8380};
8381} // namespace detail
8382template <typename RangeT>
8383class RepeatOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::RepeatOpGenericAdaptorBase {
8384 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
8385 using Base = detail::RepeatOpGenericAdaptorBase;
8386public:
8387 RepeatOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = {}, const ::mlir::EmptyProperties &properties = {}, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
8388
8389 RepeatOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : RepeatOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<::mlir::EmptyProperties *>() : ::mlir::EmptyProperties{}), regions) {}
8390
8391 RepeatOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const RepeatOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
8392
8393 template <typename LateInst = RepeatOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, RepeatOp>>>
8394 RepeatOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
8395
8396 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
8397 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
8398 }
8399
8400 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
8401 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
8402 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
8403 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
8404 }
8405
8406 ValueT getInput() {
8407 return (*getODSOperands(0).begin());
8408 }
8409
8410 RangeT getOperands() {
8411 return odsOperands;
8412 }
8413
8414private:
8415 RangeT odsOperands;
8416};
8417class RepeatOpAdaptor : public RepeatOpGenericAdaptor<::mlir::ValueRange> {
8418public:
8419 using RepeatOpGenericAdaptor::RepeatOpGenericAdaptor;
8420 RepeatOpAdaptor(RepeatOp op);
8421
8422 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);
8423};
8424class RepeatOp : public ::mlir::Op<RepeatOp, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroRegions, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneResult, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneTypedResult<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>::Impl, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroSuccessors, ::mlir::OpTrait::OneOperand, ::mlir::OpTrait::OpInvariants, ::mlir::ConditionallySpeculatable::Trait, ::mlir::OpTrait::AlwaysSpeculatableImplTrait, ::mlir::MemoryEffectOpInterface::Trait> {
8425public:
8426 using Op::Op;
8427 using Op::print;
8428 using Adaptor = RepeatOpAdaptor;
8429 template <typename RangeT>
8430 using GenericAdaptor = RepeatOpGenericAdaptor<RangeT>;
8431 using FoldAdaptor = GenericAdaptor<::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::Attribute>>;
8432 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
8433 return {};
8434 }
8435
8436 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
8437 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.bv.repeat");
8438 }
8439
8440 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
8441 return {index, 1};
8442 }
8443
8444 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
8445 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
8446 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
8447 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
8448 }
8449
8450 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType> getInput() {
8451 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>>(*getODSOperands(0).begin());
8452 }
8453
8454 ::mlir::OpOperand &getInputMutable() {
8455 auto range = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(0);
8456 return getOperation()->getOpOperand(range.first);
8457 }
8458
8459 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
8460 return {index, 1};
8461 }
8462
8463 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
8464 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
8465 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
8466 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
8467 }
8468
8469 ::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType> getResult() {
8470 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::TypedValue<::llzk::smt::BitVectorType>>(*getODSResults(0).begin());
8471 }
8472
8473 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, unsigned count, mlir::Value input);
8474 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::Type result, ::mlir::Value input);
8475 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::Value input);
8476 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
8477 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
8478 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &p);
8479 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
8480 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
8481 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify();
8482 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
8483public:
8485 unsigned getCount();
8486};
8487} // namespace smt
8488} // namespace llzk
8489MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::RepeatOp)

8612//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
8613// ::llzk::smt::SetInfoOp declarations
8614//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
8615
8616namespace detail {
8617class SetInfoOpGenericAdaptorBase {
8618public:
8619 struct Properties {
8620 using keyTy = ::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr;
8621 keyTy key;
8622
8623 auto getKey() {
8624 auto &propStorage = this->key;
8625 return ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr>(propStorage);
8626 }
8627 void setKey(const ::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr &propValue) {
8628 this->key = propValue;
8629 }
8630 using valueTy = ::mlir::Attribute;
8631 valueTy value;
8632
8633 auto getValue() {
8634 auto &propStorage = this->value;
8635 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::Attribute>(propStorage);
8636 }
8637 void setValue(const ::mlir::Attribute &propValue) {
8638 this->value = propValue;
8639 }
8640 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
8641 return
8642 rhs.key == this->key &&
8643 rhs.value == this->value &&
8644 true;
8645 }
8646 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
8647 return !(*this == rhs);
8648 }
8649 };
8650protected:
8651 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
8652 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
8653 Properties properties;
8654 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
8655public:
8656 SetInfoOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), properties(properties), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
8657 odsOpName.emplace("smt.set_info", odsAttrs.getContext());
8658 }
8659
8660 SetInfoOpGenericAdaptorBase(SetInfoOp op);
8661
8662 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
8663 return {index, 1};
8664 }
8665
8666 const Properties &getProperties() {
8667 return properties;
8668 }
8669
8670 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
8671 return odsAttrs;
8672 }
8673
8674 ::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr getKeyAttr() {
8675 auto attr = ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr>(getProperties().key);
8676 return attr;
8677 }
8678
8679 ::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr getKey();
8680 ::mlir::Attribute getValueAttr() {
8681 auto attr = ::llvm::cast<::mlir::Attribute>(getProperties().value);
8682 return attr;
8683 }
8684
8685 ::mlir::Attribute getValue();
8686};
8687} // namespace detail

8715 return odsOperands;
8716 }

8728class SetInfoOp : public ::mlir::Op<SetInfoOp, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroRegions, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroResults, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroSuccessors, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroOperands, ::mlir::OpTrait::OpInvariants, ::mlir::BytecodeOpInterface::Trait> {
8729public:
8730 using Op::Op;
8731 using Op::print;
8732 using Adaptor = SetInfoOpAdaptor;
8733 template <typename RangeT>
8734 using GenericAdaptor = SetInfoOpGenericAdaptor<RangeT>;
8735 using FoldAdaptor = GenericAdaptor<::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::Attribute>>;
8736 using Properties = FoldAdaptor::Properties;
8737 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
8738 static ::llvm::StringRef attrNames[] = {::llvm::StringRef("key"), ::llvm::StringRef("value")};
8739 return ::llvm::ArrayRef(attrNames);
8740 }
8741
8742 ::mlir::StringAttr getKeyAttrName() {
8743 return getAttributeNameForIndex(0);
8744 }
8745
8746 static ::mlir::StringAttr getKeyAttrName(::mlir::OperationName name) {
8747 return getAttributeNameForIndex(name, 0);
8748 }
8749
8750 ::mlir::StringAttr getValueAttrName() {
8751 return getAttributeNameForIndex(1);
8752 }
8753
8754 static ::mlir::StringAttr getValueAttrName(::mlir::OperationName name) {
8755 return getAttributeNameForIndex(name, 1);
8756 }
8757
8758 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
8759 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.set_info");
8760 }
8761
8762 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
8763 return {index, 1};
8764 }
8765
8766 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
8767 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
8768 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
8769 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
8770 }
8771
8772 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
8773 return {index, 1};
8774 }
8775
8776 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
8777 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
8778 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
8779 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
8780 }
8781
8782 static ::llvm::LogicalResult setPropertiesFromAttr(Properties &prop, ::mlir::Attribute attr, ::llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
8783 static ::mlir::Attribute getPropertiesAsAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop);
8784 static llvm::hash_code computePropertiesHash(const Properties &prop);
8785 static std::optional<mlir::Attribute> getInherentAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name);
8786 static void setInherentAttr(Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name, mlir::Attribute value);
8787 static void populateInherentAttrs(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs);
8788 static ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInherentAttrs(::mlir::OperationName opName, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs, llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
8789 static ::llvm::LogicalResult readProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeReader &reader, ::mlir::OperationState &state);
8790 void writeProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeWriter &writer);
8791 ::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr getKeyAttr() {
8792 return ::llvm::cast<::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr>(getProperties().key);
8793 }
8794
8795 ::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr getKey();
8796 ::mlir::Attribute getValueAttr() {
8797 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::Attribute>(getProperties().value);
8798 }
8799
8800 ::mlir::Attribute getValue();
8801 void setKeyAttr(::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr attr) {
8802 getProperties().key = attr;
8803 }
8804
8805 void setValueAttr(::mlir::Attribute attr) {
8806 getProperties().value = attr;
8807 }
8808
8809 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr key, ::mlir::Attribute value);
8810 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::llzk::smt::KeywordAttr key, ::mlir::Attribute value);
8811 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
8812 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
8813 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &p);
8814 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
8815 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
8816 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify();
8817private:
8818 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
8819 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
8820 }
8821
8822 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
8823 assert(index < 2 && "invalid attribute index");
8824 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
8825 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
8826 "dependent dialect loading?");
8827 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
8828 }
8829
8830public:
8831};
8832} // namespace smt
8833} // namespace llzk
8834MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::SetInfoOp)

8842
8843namespace detail {
8844class SetLogicOpGenericAdaptorBase {
8845public:
8846 struct Properties {
8847 using logicTy = ::mlir::StringAttr;
8848 logicTy logic;
8849
8850 auto getLogic() {
8851 auto &propStorage = this->logic;
8852 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::StringAttr>(propStorage);
8853 }
8854 void setLogic(const ::mlir::StringAttr &propValue) {
8855 this->logic = propValue;
8856 }
8857 bool operator==(const Properties &rhs) const {
8858 return
8859 rhs.logic == this->logic &&
8860 true;
8861 }
8862 bool operator!=(const Properties &rhs) const {
8863 return !(*this == rhs);
8864 }
8865 };
8866protected:
8867 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr odsAttrs;
8868 ::std::optional<::mlir::OperationName> odsOpName;
8869 Properties properties;
8870 ::mlir::RegionRange odsRegions;
8871public:
8872 SetLogicOpGenericAdaptorBase(::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : odsAttrs(attrs), properties(properties), odsRegions(regions) { if (odsAttrs)
8873 odsOpName.emplace("smt.set_logic", odsAttrs.getContext());
8874 }
8875
8876 SetLogicOpGenericAdaptorBase(SetLogicOp op);
8877
8878 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index, unsigned odsOperandsSize) {
8879 return {index, 1};
8880 }
8881
8882 const Properties &getProperties() {
8883 return properties;
8884 }
8885
8886 ::mlir::DictionaryAttr getAttributes() {
8887 return odsAttrs;
8888 }
8889
8890 ::mlir::StringAttr getLogicAttr() {
8891 auto attr = ::llvm::cast<::mlir::StringAttr>(getProperties().logic);
8892 return attr;
8893 }
8894
8895 ::llvm::StringRef getLogic();
8896};
8897} // namespace detail
8898template <typename RangeT>
8899class SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor : public detail::SetLogicOpGenericAdaptorBase {
8900 using ValueT = ::llvm::detail::ValueOfRange<RangeT>;
8901 using Base = detail::SetLogicOpGenericAdaptorBase;
8902public:
8903 SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, const Properties &properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : Base(attrs, properties, regions), odsOperands(values) {}
8904
8905 SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs, ::mlir::OpaqueProperties properties, ::mlir::RegionRange regions = {}) : SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, (properties ? *properties.as<Properties *>() : Properties{}), regions) {}
8906
8907 SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, ::mlir::DictionaryAttr attrs = nullptr) : SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor(values, attrs, Properties{}, {}) {}
8908
8909 SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, const SetLogicOpGenericAdaptorBase &base) : Base(base), odsOperands(values) {}
8910
8911 template <typename LateInst = SetLogicOp, typename = std::enable_if_t<std::is_same_v<LateInst, SetLogicOp>>>
8912 SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor(RangeT values, LateInst op) : Base(op), odsOperands(values) {}
8913
8914 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
8915 return Base::getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index, odsOperands.size());
8916 }
8917
8918 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
8919 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
8920 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
8921 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
8922 }
8923
8924 RangeT getOperands() {
8925 return odsOperands;
8926 }
8927
8928private:
8929 RangeT odsOperands;
8930};
8931class SetLogicOpAdaptor : public SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor<::mlir::ValueRange> {
8932public:
8933 using SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor::SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor;

8935
8936 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);
8937};
8938class SetLogicOp : public ::mlir::Op<SetLogicOp, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroRegions, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroResults, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroSuccessors, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroOperands, ::mlir::OpTrait::HasParent<smt::SolverOp>::Impl, ::mlir::OpTrait::OpInvariants, ::mlir::BytecodeOpInterface::Trait> {
8939public:
8940 using Op::Op;
8941 using Op::print;
8942 using Adaptor = SetLogicOpAdaptor;
8943 template <typename RangeT>
8944 using GenericAdaptor = SetLogicOpGenericAdaptor<RangeT>;
8945 using FoldAdaptor = GenericAdaptor<::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::Attribute>>;
8946 using Properties = FoldAdaptor::Properties;
8947 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
8948 static ::llvm::StringRef attrNames[] = {::llvm::StringRef("logic")};
8949 return ::llvm::ArrayRef(attrNames);
8950 }
8951
8952 ::mlir::StringAttr getLogicAttrName() {
8953 return getAttributeNameForIndex(0);
8954 }
8955
8956 static ::mlir::StringAttr getLogicAttrName(::mlir::OperationName name) {
8957 return getAttributeNameForIndex(name, 0);
8958 }
8959
8960 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
8961 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.set_logic");
8962 }
8963
8964 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
8965 return {index, 1};
8966 }
8967
8968 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
8969 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
8970 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
8971 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
8972 }
8973
8974 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
8975 return {index, 1};
8976 }
8977
8978 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
8979 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
8980 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
8981 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
8982 }
8983
8984 static ::llvm::LogicalResult setPropertiesFromAttr(Properties &prop, ::mlir::Attribute attr, ::llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
8985 static ::mlir::Attribute getPropertiesAsAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop);
8986 static llvm::hash_code computePropertiesHash(const Properties &prop);
8987 static std::optional<mlir::Attribute> getInherentAttr(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name);
8988 static void setInherentAttr(Properties &prop, llvm::StringRef name, mlir::Attribute value);
8989 static void populateInherentAttrs(::mlir::MLIRContext *ctx, const Properties &prop, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs);
8990 static ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInherentAttrs(::mlir::OperationName opName, ::mlir::NamedAttrList &attrs, llvm::function_ref<::mlir::InFlightDiagnostic()> emitError);
8991 static ::llvm::LogicalResult readProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeReader &reader, ::mlir::OperationState &state);
8992 void writeProperties(::mlir::DialectBytecodeWriter &writer);
8993 ::mlir::StringAttr getLogicAttr() {
8994 return ::llvm::cast<::mlir::StringAttr>(getProperties().logic);
8995 }
8996
8997 ::llvm::StringRef getLogic();
8998 void setLogicAttr(::mlir::StringAttr attr) {
8999 getProperties().logic = attr;
9000 }
9001
9002 void setLogic(::llvm::StringRef attrValue);
9003 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::StringAttr logic);
9004 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::StringAttr logic);
9005 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::llvm::StringRef logic);
9006 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::llvm::StringRef logic);
9007 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
9008 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
9009 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
9010 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
9011 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
9012private:
9013 ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(unsigned index) {
9014 return getAttributeNameForIndex((*this)->getName(), index);
9015 }
9016
9017 static ::mlir::StringAttr getAttributeNameForIndex(::mlir::OperationName name, unsigned index) {
9018 assert(index < 1 && "invalid attribute index");
9019 assert(name.getStringRef() == getOperationName() && "invalid operation name");
9020 assert(name.isRegistered() && "Operation isn't registered, missing a "
9021 "dependent dialect loading?");
9022 return name.getAttributeNames()[index];
9023 }
9024
9025public:
9026};
9027} // namespace smt
9028} // namespace llzk
9029MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::SetLogicOp)

9337
9338 RangeT getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
9339 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
9340 return {std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first),
9341 std::next(odsOperands.begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
9342 }
9343
9344 RangeT getValues() {
9345 return getODSOperands(0);
9346 }
9347
9348 RangeT getOperands() {
9349 return odsOperands;
9350 }
9351
9352private:
9353 RangeT odsOperands;
9354};
9355class YieldOpAdaptor : public YieldOpGenericAdaptor<::mlir::ValueRange> {
9356public:
9357 using YieldOpGenericAdaptor::YieldOpGenericAdaptor;
9358 YieldOpAdaptor(YieldOp op);
9359
9360 ::llvm::LogicalResult verify(::mlir::Location loc);
9361};
9362class YieldOp : public ::mlir::Op<YieldOp, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroRegions, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroResults, ::mlir::OpTrait::ZeroSuccessors, ::mlir::OpTrait::VariadicOperands, ::mlir::OpTrait::HasParent<smt::SolverOp, smt::CheckOp, smt::ForallOp, smt::ExistsOp>::Impl, ::mlir::OpTrait::OpInvariants, ::mlir::ConditionallySpeculatable::Trait, ::mlir::OpTrait::AlwaysSpeculatableImplTrait, ::mlir::MemoryEffectOpInterface::Trait, ::mlir::OpTrait::IsTerminator, ::mlir::RegionBranchTerminatorOpInterface::Trait, ::mlir::OpTrait::ReturnLike> {
9363public:
9364 using Op::Op;
9365 using Op::print;
9366 using Adaptor = YieldOpAdaptor;
9367 template <typename RangeT>
9368 using GenericAdaptor = YieldOpGenericAdaptor<RangeT>;
9369 using FoldAdaptor = GenericAdaptor<::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::Attribute>>;
9370 static ::llvm::ArrayRef<::llvm::StringRef> getAttributeNames() {
9371 return {};
9372 }
9373
9374 static constexpr ::llvm::StringLiteral getOperationName() {
9375 return ::llvm::StringLiteral("smt.yield");
9376 }
9377
9378 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSOperandIndexAndLength(unsigned index);
9379 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getODSOperands(unsigned index) {
9380 auto valueRange = getODSOperandIndexAndLength(index);
9381 return {std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first),
9382 std::next(getOperation()->operand_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
9383 }
9384
9385 ::mlir::Operation::operand_range getValues() {
9386 return getODSOperands(0);
9387 }
9388
9389 ::mlir::MutableOperandRange getValuesMutable();
9390 std::pair<unsigned, unsigned> getODSResultIndexAndLength(unsigned index) {
9391 return {index, 1};
9392 }
9393
9394 ::mlir::Operation::result_range getODSResults(unsigned index) {
9395 auto valueRange = getODSResultIndexAndLength(index);
9396 return {std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first),
9397 std::next(getOperation()->result_begin(), valueRange.first + valueRange.second)};
9398 }
9399
9400 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState);
9401 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &odsBuilder, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::ValueRange values);
9402 static void build(::mlir::OpBuilder &, ::mlir::OperationState &odsState, ::mlir::TypeRange resultTypes, ::mlir::ValueRange operands, ::llvm::ArrayRef<::mlir::NamedAttribute> attributes = {});
9403 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariantsImpl();
9404 ::llvm::LogicalResult verifyInvariants();
9405 ::mlir::MutableOperandRange getMutableSuccessorOperands(::mlir::RegionBranchPoint point);
9406 static ::mlir::ParseResult parse(::mlir::OpAsmParser &parser, ::mlir::OperationState &result);
9407 void print(::mlir::OpAsmPrinter &_odsPrinter);
9408 void getEffects(::llvm::SmallVectorImpl<::mlir::SideEffects::EffectInstance<::mlir::MemoryEffects::Effect>> &effects);
9409public:
9410};
9411} // namespace smt
9412} // namespace llzk
9413MLIR_DECLARE_EXPLICIT_TYPE_ID(::llzk::smt::YieldOp)
